{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Outpost 01: Oversight
| introduced = cradle-11-dreadgod
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Outpost 01: Oversight]] is a location.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c6">''Waybound'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
